title: tf.squeeze  |  TensorFlow v2.16.1
description:
Removes dimensions of size 1 from the shape of a tensor.
Given a tensorinput, this operation returns a tensor of the same type with
all dimensions of size 1 removed. If you don't want to remove all size 1
dimensions, you can remove specific size 1 dimensions by specifyingaxis.
Or, to remove specific size 1 dimensions:
